title: lepidium lyratum subsp. coronopifolium
intro: Lepidium lyratum subsp. coronopifolium, also known as Chinese cress, is a perennial plant species in the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and relieving symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Lepidium lyratum subsp. coronopifolium can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal purposes.
